title: FHIR Sync Monitor
description: A real-time ETL pipeline monitoring dashboard that aggregates sync activity across all FHIR connections. Shows pipeline throughput, sync activity trends over the last 30 days, per-connection health status, and detailed metrics for recent sync runs.
tips: The dashboard auto-refreshes every 10 seconds when there are active sync runs, and every 60 seconds when idle.
Six top-level metric cards show total connections (active/total), run counts, records written, and average mapping coverage at a glance.
The Pipeline Throughput panel shows all-time totals across four stages: extracted, mapped, written, and failed records.
The Sync Activity chart visualizes completed and failed runs over the last 30 days. Hover over any bar to see the exact breakdown for that day.
The Connection Health panel lists each FHIR connection with its last sync status, run count, and timestamp. Click a connection to navigate to its detail page.
The Recent Sync Runs table shows the last 20 runs across all connections with status, duration, record counts, and mapping coverage.
Mapping coverage is shown as a color-coded progress bar: green for 80% or above, amber for 50-79%, and red below 50%.
Click the error icon on any failed run to expand and view the full error message for troubleshooting.
